_authority: OWNER 2026-07-19 directive: cost gate must use REAL Darwinex-Zero / FTMO worst-case costs, not heuristic per-trade class figures. Built ON the OWNER-ratified worst-case model in framework/registry/live_commission.json (2026-06-01) and the DXZ23 requal / FTMO Round24 costing chains.
convention: gate cost = max(dxz, ftmo) worst-case per round-trip lot. Per-trade engine (tools/strategy_farm/portfolio/commission.py) computes cost_rt = max(pct_rate_rt * notional_acct, flat_per_lot_rt * volume). ftmo worst-case (deal/report chain) = profit + swap - max(2x|close_commission|, registry flat round-trip fallback); the flat fallback = live_commission.json flat_per_lot_rt.

canonical_engine.note: This venue_cost_model refines the class model to PER-SYMBOL, per-venue truth. Where a per-symbol worst_case differs from the class model, it is flagged in the symbol's notes. pct_rate_rt 0.00005 = 0.005% of notional round-trip = 0.5 basis points.

sources.what: GROUND TRUTH: Darwinex real commission schedule as loaded into the MT5 strategy tester (UTF-16 LE). Per-side CommissionValue + CommissionMode per symbol-path group. This is the broker's actual injected commission table, not an estimate.
Maps each .DWX symbol to its Custom\... tester group path (=> which CommissionValue applies). Resolves WS30=Index1(cheap), NDX/UK100=Index3, GDAXI=IndexDAX, commodities=Commodities\*.

Official DXZ page: forex & commodities gross commission ~0.005% of trade nominal in base currency round-trip; 1 lot EURUSD (EUR100k) = EUR5 RT; charged in instrument/base ccy then FX-converted; DXZ mirrors underlying Darwinex execution conditions.

DXZ Zero: execution cost depends on asset and open volume; per-asset commission table is behind darwinexzero.com/assets (login-gated, OWNER-only). Confirms DXZ Zero mirrors real Darwinex commissions/swaps.
Official FTMO: zero commission applies to ALL index symbols.
FTMO symbols page; per-instrument commission numbers are on the platform contract specs (not published in page body).

Secondary review: FTMO forex ~$5/lot round-turn; indices commission-free; oil (cash CFD) commission-free; gold reported very low. Corroborated by 2026 web sources that FTMO Sep-2025 raw model = $2.50/side forex & metals = $5 RT.
Claude research note establishing DXZ is asset-class-specific %-notional/per-contract, NOT a flat $7/lot; FX ~EUR5 RT.
Engineering spec defining the max(DXZ,FTMO) per-class worst-case model that live_commission.json encodes.
Per-symbol commission values copied from the tester Groups file; swap values marked PENDING MT5 runtime snapshot (SYMBOL_SWAP_LONG/SHORT) for ALL symbols.

DXZ-23 requal wave: per-sleeve DXZ 0.005% (0.5bp) round-trip commission-adjusted PF; spread/swap/slippage explicitly OPEN (not certified). Registry mixed USD-flat/EUR-notional max() excluded as dimensionally uncertified.
Reconciles Q08 emitted net + missing entry-side commission to MT5 Net Profit for NDX/USDJPY/GDAXI (native tester commissions from the DXZ Groups file).
FTMO Round1-30 screen; PnL correction = profit + swap - max(2*abs(close_commission), registry flat round-trip fallback). Defines the FTMO worst-case convention.

FTMO trial 1513845506 journals (06-17.07). Deal lines present (e.g. XAUUSD @4074.34, US100.cash @29561-29828, USOIL.cash @71.423). PER-DEAL COMMISSION IS NOT FILE-VISIBLE in journals (MT5 journals record only 'deal # ... done', never the commission amount). Reference prices below are drawn from these deals; commission ground-truth would require an exported account history report (not on disk).
DXZ live 4000090541 journals since 2026-06-28. grep 'commission' => 0 hits: per-deal commission NOT file-visible. Same limitation as FTMO journal.

ground_truth_note: Per-deal commission is NOT visible in MT5 terminal journal (.log) files for either live account (DXZ 4000090541) or the FTMO trial (1513845506). MT5 journals log order/deal execution ('deal # ... done') but never the commission charge. The authoritative per-deal commission lives only in the terminal's history DB / an exported account statement, which is not present on disk. Therefore the commission figures below are sourced from (1) the DXZ tester Groups file = Darwinex's real injected commission schedule, and (2) official venue pages + FTMO secondary sources. Indicative per-lot USD figures for %-of-notional instruments use reference prices observed in the FTMO trial journal 2026-07-10 (gold 4074.34, US100 ~29,700, USOIL 71.423) and approximate 2026 FX levels, and are LABELLED indicative because they scale with price.

reference_prices_indicative_2026_07._note: Indicative only; gold/US100/oil from FTMO journal 2026-07-10, FX/other approximate. Used ONLY to illustrate %-of-notional commission as a per-lot USD number.

dxz.commission_rt_basis: EUR5 RT (2.5 EUR/side, tester Groups Forex\* Mode=1 base-ccy) => ~$5.85 at EURUSD 1.17; = 0.005% of USD notional
dxz.spread_source: embedded in .DWX 100% real-tick history; current broker-parity NOT certified (DXZ23 cohort gate S). Secondary/marketing ~0.1-0.6 pip, not our data.

ftmo.commission_rt_basis: $2.50/side = $5 RT (FTMO Sep-2025 raw forex/metals model; fxempire secondary). Official contract spec platform-gated.

EURUSD.notes: DXZ %-notional ($5.85 at 1.17) > FTMO flat ($5). Registry class-flat $5 is the FTMO floor; the engine's 0.00005*notional term recovers the DXZ figure when notional_acct is supplied. USD-equiv varies with EURUSD level (EUR5 fixed in base ccy).

dxz.commission_rt_basis: GBP5 RT (2.5 GBP/side, tester Groups Forex\* Mode=1 base-ccy) => ~$6.35 at GBPUSD 1.27; = 0.005% of USD notional
dxz.spread_source: embedded in .DWX real-tick history; broker-parity NOT certified.

GBPUSD.notes: DXZ %-notional dominates because GBP base notional (~$127k/lot) > $100k. Highest forex worst-case in the book. This is the number the Pound-Shorter rescue must use (see scratchpad note b).

dxz.commission_rt_basis: USD5 RT (base ccy = USD, 100k USD notional) = 0.005% of $100k.
dxz.spread_source: embedded in .DWX real-tick history; broker-parity NOT certified.

USDJPY.notes: USD-base pair: DXZ and FTMO both = $5 RT. Registry class-flat $5 exact.

dxz.commission_rt_basis: AUD5 RT (2.5 AUD/side base ccy) => ~$3.30 at AUDUSD 0.66; = 0.005% of ~$66k USD notional.
dxz.spread_source: embedded in .DWX real-tick history; broker-parity NOT certified.

AUDUSD.notes: FTMO flat $5 DOMINATES because AUD base notional (~$66k) makes DXZ %-notional only ~$3.30. Registry class-flat $5 correct here.

dxz.commission_rt_basis: 0.005% of notional RT; at gold $4074/oz x 100oz = $407,400 notional => $20.37 per FULL lot. tester Groups Commodities\* CommissionValue=0.0025 Mode=4. Official DXZ page confirms commodities 0.005% notional RT.
dxz.spread_source: embedded in .DWX real-tick history; broker-parity NOT certified. Card cites ~20-30c indicative.

ftmo.commission_rt_basis: FTMO metals 0.0025%/side = 0.005% RT (FTMO US spec, secondary) ~= DXZ. Some reviews report lower (~0.0014%). Use 0.005% RT as conservative.

XAUUSD.notes: %-of-notional, flat floor $0. Per-lot $20.37 is a FULL 1.0 lot at $4074 gold; realised per-trade at RISK_FIXED $1000 sizing is far smaller (~$0.7-2/trade for typical ATR stops, up to ~$6 for tight stops) because lots are small. DXZ ~= FTMO metals; both %-notional.

dxz.commission_rt_basis: 0.005% of notional RT; at silver ~$38/oz x 5000oz = ~$190,000 => ~$9.5 per full lot (INDICATIVE, silver price approximate). tester Groups Commodities\* 0.0025 Mode=4.
dxz.spread_source: embedded in .DWX real-tick history; broker-parity NOT certified.

XAGUSD.notes: Silver contract 5000oz; silver reference price approximate (not in FTMO journal). %-notional both venues.

dxz.commission_rt_basis: UNRESOLVED: SP500.DWX has an EMPTY import_log_path in dwx_symbol_matrix.csv (OWNER-provided custom symbol) so its tester Groups path (Index 1/2/3) is not determinable from files. If Index 2 => $0.55 RT (0.275/side); if Index 3 => $5.50 RT (2.75/side).
dxz.spread_source: embedded in .DWX real-tick history; broker-parity NOT certified.

SP500.notes: worst_case = DXZ figure (FTMO=$0). RESOLVE by reading SYMBOL_PATH of SP500.DWX on T1 or its tester group; bounded $0.55-$5.50 RT. Registry class-flat currently charges $5.5 (upper bound, conservative).

US500.notes: US500 == SP500 (DXZ .DWX alias SP500.DWX, live order symbol SP500). See SP500 entry.

dxz.commission_rt_basis: 2.75 USD/side (margin ccy USD) => $5.50 RT. tester Groups Indices\Index 3\* Mode=3(margin ccy). Symbol matrix: NDX.DWX under Custom\Indices\Index 3.
dxz.spread_source: embedded in .DWX real-tick history; broker-parity NOT certified.

US100.notes: worst_case = DXZ $5.50 (FTMO=$0). Matches registry index class-flat $5.5 exactly. Reconciled to native tester commission in Q08_ROUND_TRIP_COMMISSION_HANDOFF (QM5_10375/NDX).

dxz.commission_rt_basis: 0.35 USD/side (margin ccy) => $0.70 RT. tester Groups Indices\Index 1\* Mode=3. Symbol matrix: WS30.DWX under Custom\Indices\Index 1.
dxz.spread_source: embedded in .DWX real-tick history; broker-parity NOT certified.

WS30.notes: DISCREPANCY: WS30 real DXZ = $0.70 RT but the registry index class-flat charges $5.5 => WS30 is ~8x OVER-COSTED by the current class model. US30 is the cheapest index to trade. Fix candidate: per-symbol index rates.

US30.notes: US30 == WS30.DWX. See WS30 ($0.70 RT, cheapest index).

dxz.commission_rt_basis: 2.75 EUR/side (margin ccy EUR) => EUR5.50 RT => ~$6.05 at EURUSD 1.10-1.17. tester Groups Indices\Index DAX\* Mode=3. Symbol matrix: GDAXI.DWX under Custom\Indices\Index DAX.
dxz.spread_source: embedded in .DWX real-tick history; broker-parity NOT certified.

GER40.notes: Margin ccy EUR => EUR5.50 RT (~$6.05). Slightly ABOVE registry class-flat $5.5 in USD terms because charged in EUR. Reconciled native tester commission in Q08 handoff (QM5_12986/GDAXI).

dxz.commission_rt_basis: 2.75 GBP/side (margin ccy GBP) => GBP5.50 RT => ~$6.99 at GBPUSD 1.27. tester Groups Indices\Index 3\* Mode=3. Symbol matrix: UK100.DWX under Custom\Indices\Index 3.
dxz.spread_source: embedded in .DWX real-tick history; broker-parity NOT certified.

UK100.notes: Margin ccy GBP => GBP5.50 RT (~$6.99). ABOVE registry class-flat $5.5 in USD terms (charged in GBP). Most expensive index in USD terms.

dxz.commission_rt_basis: 0.005% of notional RT; at WTI $71.4/bbl x 1000 = $71,400 notional => ~$3.57 per full lot (oil price 71.423 from FTMO journal 2026-07-10). tester Groups Commodities\* 0.0025 Mode=4.
dxz.spread_source: embedded in .DWX real-tick history; broker-parity NOT certified.

XTIUSD.notes: worst_case = DXZ 0.005% notional (FTMO oil = $0). Contract 1000 bbl. Realised per-trade small at $1000-risk sizing.

dxz.commission_rt_basis: NOT in DXZ .DWX universe (no XBRUSD.DWX in dwx_symbol_matrix.csv; only WTI XTIUSD and nat-gas XNGUSD energies). If added it would inherit Commodities\* 0.005% notional RT.

XBRUSD.notes: AVAILABILITY GAP: Brent not tradable on our DXZ .DWX symbol set. worst_case unresolved until XBRUSD.DWX is imported; would be 0.005% notional (~$3.75/full lot at $75) under Commodities\*.

dxz.commission_rt_basis: 0.005% of notional RT; tester Groups Commodities\* 0.0025 Mode=4. Per-lot USD null: nat-gas contract size/notional not pinned from files (custom_tv=10.0; nat gas ~$3.5/MMBtu). Model is 0.005% of notional.
dxz.spread_source: embedded in .DWX real-tick history; broker-parity NOT certified.

XNGUSD.notes: worst_case = DXZ 0.005% notional (FTMO=$0). Per-lot USD unresolved: RESOLVE by reading SYMBOL_TRADE_CONTRACT_SIZE for XNGUSD.DWX on T1. Memory reports realised XNG commission ~$0.4-6.7/trade.

open_axes_not_covered.spread: OPEN for all symbols. .DWX 100% real-tick history embeds historical spread in tester prices but does NOT certify current or broker-parity spread (DXZ23 cohort gate S). No per-symbol current spread is captured to disk; spread_typical_points=null everywhere. RESOLVE by a T1 SYMBOL_SPREAD / live-tick snapshot vs .DWX comparison.
open_axes_not_covered.swap: OPEN for all symbols. V5_SYMBOL_COMMISSION_SWAP_BASELINE marks SYMBOL_SWAP_LONG/SHORT as PENDING MT5 runtime snapshot for every symbol; no real swap numbers exist on disk. swap_note=null everywhere (never invented). RESOLVE by a T1 script exporting SYMBOL_SWAP_MODE/LONG/SHORT/ROLLOVER3DAYS. Weekend-flat D1 strategies (e.g. XAU Friday) are swap-immune by construction.

discrepancies_vs_old_heuristics: Heuristic per-trade class figures (reference_commission_by_asset_class 2026-06-26: FX ~$45/trade, index ~$4.4/trade, commodity ~$0.4-6.7/trade) are REALISED-per-trade averages that fold in our lot sizing; they are NOT venue rates and must not be used as gate cost constants ('fantasy figures' per OWNER 2026-07-19). Use the per-lot venue rates here x actual trade volume/notional instead.
WS30/US30 is ~8x OVER-COSTED by the current live_commission.json index class-flat ($5.5) vs real DXZ $0.70 RT.
GBPUSD/UK100/GER40 are UNDER-COSTED in USD terms by the class-flat when charged in a base/margin currency stronger than USD (GBPUSD real $6.35 vs $5 flat; UK100 ~$6.99 vs $5.5; GER40 ~$6.05 vs $5.5).

Legacy flat $7/lot (q04_walkforward.py COMMISSION_PER_LOT_ROUND_TRIP, line 41) is a stale fallback only; primary Q04 path already uses per-class realistic rates (DL-073). The $7 is ~40% above real forex and wrong-model for index/commodity.

FTMO forex worst-case ($5 RT) EQUALS the registry forex flat $5 (confirmed, not under-costed) — earlier concern that FTMO might be $6 RT is not supported by current sources (Sep-2025 raw model = $2.50/side).
